推荐场景: 学习咨询桌｜设定具体目标
60秒任务: 「设定目标」：目标/困难/建议/复盘；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 目标｜习惯｜困难｜建议｜复盘｜未来重点
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
My goal is to ___.（说明目标）
I want to improve ___ by ___.（设定具体目标）
The main reason is ___.（说明原因）
I need a clear plan.（表达需求）
Let’s break it into small steps.（拆分任务）
I can spend ___ minutes a day on it.（说明投入）
What should I focus on first?（询问重点）
This goal is useful, but maybe too broad.（评价目标）
Could we make it more specific?（细化目标）
I’ll track my progress each week.（跟踪进度）
If I miss a day, I’ll start again the next day.（处理断档）
That sounds achievable.（评价可行性）
Let’s set a deadline.（设定期限）
My next step is to ___.（行动项）
I’ll review the goal next month.（复盘安排）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: goal, plan, step, reason, focus, progress, deadline
Verbs: improve, break down, focus, track, miss, start again
Adjectives / Adverbs: specific, broad, achievable, clear
Time / Place: every day, each week, next month, first
Chunks: clear plan, small steps, track progress, set a deadline, next step
